resource.prompt: can you add  fa fucniton that remembers the repo next time? so if i send it from jules, it'll attach itself tot hat repo, and remmber it

gitPatch.suggestedCommitMessage:
feat: remember last used repository in new session dialog

Save the last selected repository in localStorage during session creation and retrieve it when loading sources. Validates that the saved repository still exists in the user's available sources before using it as the default.
